Concéntrate en que la parte superior de tu brazo no se despegue de la almohadilla en ningún momento.

description.es:
Este ejercicio de aislamiento es excelente para lograr una fuerte contracción y estiramiento en los músculos pectorales, enfocándose en la parte interna del pecho.

InstruccionesPosición: En una estación de poleas, ajusta ambas poleas a una posición alta. Toma un agarre en cada mano, da un paso al frente para generar tensión y mantén el torso ligeramente inclinado hacia adelante.Movimiento: Con una ligera pero constante flexión en los codos, junta las manos al frente y abajo de tu cuerpo en un movimiento de arco amplio, como si estuvieras abrazando un árbol.Contracción: Aprieta el pecho con fuerza en el punto de máxima contracción. Regresa de forma lenta y controlada a la posición inicial, sintiendo cómo se estira el pectoral.

description.es:
The body is then explosively pulled up by the arms in a radial pull-up, with greater speed than a regular pull-up. When the bar approaches the upper chest, the wrists are swiftly flexed to bring the forearms above the bar. The body is leaned forward, and the elbows are straightened by activating the triceps. The routine is considered complete when the bar is at the level of the waist and the arms are fully straight.
To dismount, the arms are bent at the elbow, and the body is lowered to the floor, and the exercise can be repeated.
As a relatively advanced exercise, muscle-ups are typically first learned with an assistive kip. The legs swing (kip) up and provide momentum to assist in the explosive upward force needed to ascend above the bar. More advanced athletes can perform a strict variation of the muscle-up which is done slowly, without any kip. This variation begins with a still dead hang and uses isometric muscle contraction to ascend above the bar in a slow, controlled fashion.
description.en:
The body is then explosively pulled up by the arms in a radial pull-up, with greater speed than a regular pull-up. When the bar approaches the upper chest, the wrists are swiftly flexed to bring the forearms above the bar. The body is leaned forward, and the elbows are straightened by activating the triceps. The routine is considered complete when the bar is at the level of the waist and the arms are fully straight.
To dismount, the arms are bent at the elbow, and the body is lowered to the floor, and the exercise can be repeated.
As a relatively advanced exercise, muscle-ups are typically first learned with an assistive kip. The legs swing (kip) up and provide momentum to assist in the explosive upward force needed to ascend above the bar. More advanced athletes can perform a strict variation of the muscle-up which is done slowly, without any kip. description.es:
Step 1: Sit on an exercise mat with your legs extended in front of you. 
Step 2: Grasp a plate in both hands as if holding a steering wheel, arms slightly bent, and hold it in front of your abdominals. 
Step 3: With knees slightly bent, cross your ankles and slowly lift them a few inches off the floor. 
Step 4: Keep your back straight but lean backward slightly to help maintain balance. 
Step 5: Exhaling, rotate your torso (twist) to the right side and touch the end of the plate to the floor. 
Step 6: Inhale and return to the forward facing start position. 
Step 7: Exhaling, rotate your torso (twist) to the left side and touch the end of the plate to the floor. 
Step 8: Inhale and return to the forward facing start position. 
Step 9: Repeat for a full set.

description.es: Este ejercicio se realiza en una máquina convergente específica que permite un movimiento de empuje en un ángulo diagonal, situándose a medio camino entre un press de banca y un press militar. Es ideal para trabajar los hombros, especialmente la cabeza anterior del deltoides, minimizando la implicación del pectoral.Instrucciones:Siéntate en la máquina con la espalda firmemente apoyada en el respaldo, que debe tener una ligera inclinación hacia atrás.Sujeta los agarres y empújalos hacia adelante y hacia arriba en la trayectoria diagonal que marca la máquina, hasta que tus brazos estén casi completamente extendidos. Haz una pausa contrayendo los hombros y regresa de forma lenta y controlada a la posición inicial.
description.en:
You sit at the bench press device, back slightly tilted to the back. The bar should be about 20 cm in front of you. Then you push the bar and take it back again, as you would with a bench press.
In this position you strain your chest muscles a lot less, which is nice if you want to train, but your chest hasn't recovered yet.

note.es: Escoge tus 3 skills favoritos y practica. Handstand, L-sit, muscle-up, front lever.
note.en: Pick your 3 favorite skills and practice. Handstand, L-sit, muscle-up, front lever.

note.es: Colgado, lleva los pies por detrás sobre la barra. Movilidad de hombros.
note.en: Hanging, bring feet behind over the bar. Shoulder mobility.

description.es: Rotación completa del cuerpo pasando por debajo de la barra hasta posición de german hang. Excelente para movilidad de hombros y preparación de back lever.
description.en: Full body rotation passing under the bar to a german hang position. Excellent for shoulder mobility and back lever preparation.

description.es: Planche con piernas abiertas y extendidas. Reduce ligeramente la palanca respecto al full planche.
description.en: Planche with legs straddled and extended. Slightly reduces leverage compared to the full planche.

note.es: Último viernes del mes: pull-up máx, push-up máx, L-sit tiempo, pistol squat máx. Anota y compara.
note.en: Last Friday of the month: max pull-ups, max push-ups, L-sit time, max pistol squats. Record and compare.

note.es: Rodillas al pecho, cuerpo horizontal. Extremadamente difícil.
note.en: Knees to chest, body horizontal. Extremely difficult.

description.es: Soporte horizontal con rodillas recogidas al pecho y pies despegados del suelo. Primera posición real de planche.
description.en: Horizontal support with knees tucked to chest and feet off the ground. First real planche position.

note.es: Push-up desde tuck planche. Extremadamente difícil.
note.en: Push-up from tuck planche. Extremely difficult.

description.es: Flexión desde posición de tuck planche. Añade componente dinámico de empuje a la fuerza isométrica de la planche.
description.en: Push-up from tuck planche position. Adds a dynamic pushing component to planche isometric strength.

description.es: Soporte con rodillas recogidas al pecho, pies despegados del suelo. Primera progresión para desarrollar la fuerza de compresión del L-sit.
description.en: Support hold with knees tucked to chest, feet off the ground. First progression to build the compression strength needed for L-sit.

description.es: Soporte con piernas extendidas por encima de la horizontal, formando una V. Progresión avanzada del L-sit que exige compresión extrema.
description.en: Support hold with legs extended above horizontal, forming a V shape. Advanced L-sit progression demanding extreme compression.

description.es: Plancha invertida con los pies en la pared y el pecho mirando hacia ella. Primer paso para acostumbrarse a la posición invertida.
description.en: Inverted plank with feet on the wall and chest facing it. First step to get comfortable in an inverted position.

exercises.youtube_query: Wall Plank (chest to wall) exercise tutorial

note.es: Espalda plana contra la pared, 90° rodillas.
note.en: Flat back against the wall, 90° knees.

description.es: Sentadilla isométrica con la espalda apoyada en la pared y rodillas a 90 grados. Construye resistencia en cuádriceps y estabilidad de rodilla.
description.en: Isometric squat with back against the wall and knees at 90 degrees. Builds quad endurance and knee stability.
